deck_plans.note: MSC does not publish a standalone ship map PDF for MSC Meraviglia at the service.msccruises.com/shipmap path (unlike Bellissima, Grandiosa, Virtuosa, Euribia, Magnifica, Armonia, Lirica, etc.)

stats_fallback.builder: STX France (now Chantiers de l'Atlantique), Saint-Nazaire

related.class_siblings: Base Meraviglia class: MSC Meraviglia (2017, first-in-class), MSC Bellissima (2019). Meraviglia-Plus sub-class: MSC Grandiosa (2019), MSC Virtuosa (2021), MSC Euribia (2023).
related.cirque_du_soleil: YES - Cirque du Soleil at Sea in the Carousel Lounge (Deck 7, 410 seats). First Cirque at Sea venue in the cruise industry.

deployment.2023_to_april_2026: Exclusively homeported in New York (April 2023 through April 2026); largest cruise ship ever to port in Manhattan
deployment.summer_2026: Western Mediterranean 7-night round-trips (Livorno, Naples, Palermo, Tunis, Barcelona, Marseille)
deployment.winter_2026_27_onwards: Year-round Miami (first MSC year-round Miami ship). Bermuda (6-night with King's Wharf overnights), Bahamas/Caribbean (7-8 night to Nassau + Ocean Cay), Canada/New England (10-11 night).
deployment.announcement: August 2025 announcement that Meraviglia becomes MSC's first year-round Miami ship starting winter 2026-27

history.delivered: 31 May 2017, Saint-Nazaire (STX France, yard number E34)
history.largest_manhattan: Became the largest cruise ship ever to port in Manhattan (2019)
history.recent_drydock: 2024 Palumbo Malta Shipyard (shore power, LED lighting, Crystal Lounge refresh)
history.notable_context: First MSC ship to host Cirque du Soleil at Sea (from delivery in 2017)
